title: lannea triphylla
intro: Lannea triphylla, also known as the African cherry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Anacardiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lannea triphylla include the treatment of fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems, as well as its use as an antiseptic and a natural remedy for wounds and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
